calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Wake County Public School System in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Wake County Public School System (WCPSS) is Monday, August 25, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Wake County Public School System in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Wake County Public School System is Thursday, June 11, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days — five more than the North Carolina state minimum of 180.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Wake County Public School System runs March 30–April 6, 2026 — an 8-day break, one of the longer spring breaks among North Carolina's large school districts.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Wake County Public School System runs December 22, 2025–January 2, 2026 (12 days). School resumes Monday, January 5, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2025-2026 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Wake County Public School System runs November 26–28, 2025 (Wednesday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 27. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: 8-Day Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs 8 days — one of the longer spring breaks among NC's large districts.

yearNumbers.label: 185 Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Wake County requires 185 instructional days — 5 more than the NC state minimum of 180, adding a full extra week of school.

calendarNotes: Wake County Public School System begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 25, 2025. Presidents' Break runs February 16–20, 2026 — a full school week off in mid-February that is uncommon outside North Carolina. Spring Break runs March 30–April 6, 2026. The school year ends June 11, 2026.
